basic_details.job_title: DHS Dindigul Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 ANM, OT Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Dindigul (DHS Dindigul) Various Contractual Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website Dindigul District Official Website. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced through the DHS Dindigul Various Contractual Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: ANM: 35 Years Audiologist & Speech Therapists: 35 Years Occupational Therapist: 40 Years Audio metrician: 35 Years Radiographer: 35 Years OT Assistant: 35 Years Mid-Level Health Provider: 50 Years Multi Purpose Hospital Worker: 45 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in GNM/B.Sc Nursing, 8th Standard, BASLP Courses, Bachelors/Master's Degree in Occupational Therapy, 12th grade with science subjects, B.Sc Radiography, 3 Months OT Technician Course, ANM
qualification.details: Mid-Level Health Provider: Diploma in GNM/B.Sc Nursing from a recognized University/Institution. Multi Purpose Hospital Worker: Minimum 8th Standard with the ability to read and write. Audiologist & Speech Therapists: BASLP Courses from a recognized institution. Occupational Therapist: Bachelors/Master's Degree in Occupational Therapy from a recognized University. Audio metrician: 12th grade with science subjects, followed by a one-year certificate course in audiometry from a government or recognized institution, or a Diploma in Hearing Language and Speech (DHLS). Radiographer: B.Sc Radiography. OT Assistant: 3 Months OT Technician Course from recognized University/Institutions. ANM: ANM qualification from Government or Government approved private Auxiliary Nurse Midwife School recognized by the Indian Nursing Council.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Dindigul Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://dindigul.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
